prompt: Write a short poem (8–16 lines) about the feeling of finishing a long project. Any form you like.
response:
Here is a poem I wrote to capture the feeling of finishing a long project:

The journey’s done,
And now we’re through,
The time spent well,
And now – we’re done.
This project that took
Months to complete,
Now it’s finally
Time to celebrate.
And just like that,
It’s done, it’s done,
 The end of a journey
 That’s taken its toll,
 And now we’re through,
 The time spent well,
 And now – we’re done.
